## Summary / 摘要

- What does this PR change?
- Why is this change needed?

## Checklist / 检查项

- [ ] Scope stays focused
- [ ] Docs are updated when needed
- [ ] Related `evals/evals.json` is updated when behavior changed
- [ ] Commands and examples in docs were checked
- [ ] No secrets or private data are included

## Validation / 验证

- [ ] `python3 skills/github-fetch-release-notes/scripts/fetch_updates.py --help`
- [ ] JSON and Markdown changes were reviewed

## Notes / 备注

- Anything reviewers should pay extra attention to?
